# terrible_cisco_mso_mso_schema_template_filter_entry (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `filter` (String) The name of the filter to manage. There should be no space in the filter name. APIC will throw an error if a space is provided in the filter name. See the `filter_display_name` attribute if you want the display name of the filter to contain a space.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `schema` (String) The name of the schema.
- `template` (String) The name of the template.

### Optional

- `arp_flag` (String) The ARP flag to use for this filter entry.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `destination_from` (String) The destination port range from.
- `destination_to` (String) The destination port range to.
- `display_name` (String) The name as displayed on the MSO web interface.
- `entry` (String) The filter entry name to manage.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `ethertype` (String) The ethernet type to use for this filter entry.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `filter_description` (String) The description of this filter is supported on versions of MSO that are 3.3 or greater.
- `filter_display_name` (String) The name as displayed on the MSO web interface.
- `filter_entry_description` (String) The description of this filter entry.
- `fragments_only` (Boolean) Whether this filter entry only matches fragments.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ip_protocol` (String) The IP protocol to use for this filter entry.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `source_from` (String) The source port range from.
- `source_to` (String) The source port range to.
- `state` (String) Use `present` or `absent` for adding or removing. Use `query` for listing an object or multiple objects.
- `stateful` (Boolean) Whether this filter entry is stateful.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tcp_session_rules` (String) A list of TCP session rules.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
